command: ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 command -v tar
ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 command -v mysql

mysqldump -h127.0.0.1 -P33061 -uroot -psource-root custalpha_wpdemo | ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 'mysql -htarget-db -P3306 -uroot -ptarget-root custalphasql2'

mysqldump -h127.0.0.1 -P33061 -uroot -psource-root custalpha_analytics | ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 'mysql -htarget-db -P3306 -uroot -ptarget-root custalphasql3'

tar -cf - -C ./testing/data/source/customers/custalpha/wp-demo.test/ . | ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 'mkdir -p /data/customers/custalpha/wp-demo.test/ && tar -xf - -C /data/customers/custalpha/wp-demo.test/ && sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /data/customers/custalpha/wp-demo.test/'

tar -cf - -C ./testing/data/source/customers/custalpha/static-demo.test/ . | ssh -i ./testing/ssh/id_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 2222 -l root 127.0.0.1 'mkdir -p /data/customers/custalpha/static-demo.test/ && tar -xf - -C /data/customers/custalpha/static-demo.test/ && sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /data/customers/custalpha/static-demo.test/'
